Home → 5-Star Hotels in Athens

5-Star Hotels in Athens

Compare Athens 5-star stays by neighborhood, price signal, Acropolis view, rooftop bar, and traveler fit.

Quick answer

For 5-star stays, start with Syntagma, Plaka, Kolonaki, and Psyrri.

Syntagma carries the strongest classic luxury signals, Plaka works for historic luxury near the Acropolis, Kolonaki adds a polished hillside option, and Psyrri adds a design-forward city stay.

Compare hotels How to choose FAQs

How to Choose

Classic luxury

Syntagma is the strongest starting point for landmark city-centre luxury.

Historic luxury

Plaka is the better fit when old-city atmosphere and Acropolis access matter.

Confirm before booking

Live rates, view categories, and included amenities can change by date and room type.

Source and Selection Notes

Hotels are included when their stored Hotels of Athens fields match this page’s criteria. The page does not use unsupported review scores, fake rankings, or invented live availability. Treat prices as directional signals and confirm live rates, room type, cancellation terms, access rules, and views before booking.

Plaka hotelsSyntagma hotelsKolonaki hotelsPsyrri hotels

FAQs: 5-Star Hotels in Athens

Which Athens area is best for 5-star hotels?

Syntagma has the strongest concentration of 5-star luxury signals in this dataset.

Do 5-star Athens hotels have rooftop bars?

Several tracked 5-star hotels show rooftop-bar signals, but not all do.

Are all 5-star hotels in Athens near the Acropolis?

No. Some are closer to Syntagma, Kolonaki, or Psyrri, so compare area fit as well as star category.
